'''roradhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:elastofluid|elastofluid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elastofluid|elastofluid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| roradhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:roradhithi|roradhithi]] || [[word:roradhiji|roradhiji]] || [[word:roradhishi|roradhishi]] || [[word:roradhiki|roradhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:roradhuthuthu|roradhuthuthu]] || [[word:roradhujuju|roradhujuju]] || [[word:roradhushushu|roradhushushu]] || [[word:roradhukuku|roradhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:roradhuthu|roradhuthu]] || [[word:roradhuju|roradhuju]] || [[word:roradhushu|roradhushu]] || [[word:roradhuku|roradhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:roradhufthuf|roradhufthuf]] || [[word:roradhufjuf|roradhufjuf]] || [[word:roradhufshuf|roradhufshuf]] || [[word:roradhufkuf|roradhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:roradhethe|roradhethe]] || [[word:roradheje|roradheje]] || [[word:roradheshe|roradheshe]] || [[word:roradheke|roradheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:roradhothotho|roradhothotho]] || [[word:roradhojojo|roradhojojo]] || [[word:roradhoshosho|roradhoshosho]] || [[word:roradhokoko|roradhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:roradhotho|roradhotho]] || [[word:roradhojo|roradhojo]] || [[word:roradhosho|roradhosho]] || [[word:roradhoko|roradhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:roradhofthof|roradhofthof]] || [[word:roradhofjof|roradhofjof]] || [[word:roradhofshof|roradhofshof]] || [[word:roradhofkof|roradhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfthĂŻf|roradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfjĂŻf|roradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfshĂŻf|roradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfkĂŻf|roradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|roradhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|roradhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|roradhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|roradhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfthĂŻf|roradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfjĂŻf|roradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfshĂŻf|roradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfkĂŻf|roradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfthĂŻf|roradhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfjĂŻf|roradhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfshĂŻf|roradhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:roradhĂŻfkĂŻf|roradhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:roradhĂŠthĂŠ|roradhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:roradhĂŠjĂŠ|roradhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:roradhĂŠshĂŠ|roradhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:roradhĂŠkĂŠ|roradhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:roradhathatha|roradhathatha]] || [[word:roradhajaja|roradhajaja]] || [[word:roradhashasha|roradhashasha]] || [[word:roradhakaka|roradhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:roradhatha|roradhatha]] || [[word:roradhaja|roradhaja]] || [[word:roradhasha|roradhasha]] || [[word:roradhaka|roradhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:roradhafthaf|roradhafthaf]] || [[word:roradhafjaf|roradhafjaf]] || [[word:roradhafshaf|roradhafshaf]] || [[word:roradhafkaf|roradhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:roradhasha|roradhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:roradhshĂ«asha|roradhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:roradhroasha|roradhroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:roradhmuasha|roradhmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:roradhyaasha|roradhyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gororadhnkshĂ«asha|gororadhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gororadhnkroasha|gororadhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gororadhnkmuasha|gororadhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gororadhnkyaasha|gororadhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:roraradhasha|roraradhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:roraradhshĂ«asha|roraradhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:roraradhroasha|roraradhroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:roraradhmuasha|roraradhmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:roraradhyaasha|roraradhyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gororaradhnkshĂ«asha|gororaradhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gororaradhnkroasha|gororaradhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gororaradhnkmuasha|gororaradhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gororaradhnkyaasha|gororaradhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rerĂŠdhasha|rerĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rerĂŠdhshĂ«asha|rerĂŠdhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rerĂŠdhroasha|rerĂŠdhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rerĂŠdhmuasha|rerĂŠdhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rerĂŠdhyaasha|rerĂŠdhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorerĂŠdhnkshĂ«asha|gorerĂŠdhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorerĂŠdhnkroasha|gorerĂŠdhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorerĂŠdhnkmuasha|gorerĂŠdhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorerĂŠdhnkyaasha|gorerĂŠdhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rorfadhasha|rorfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rorfadhshĂ«asha|rorfadhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rorfadhroasha|rorfadhroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rorfadhmuasha|rorfadhmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rorfadhyaasha|rorfadhyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gororfadhnkshĂ«asha|gororfadhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gororfadhnkroasha|gororfadhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gororfadhnkmuasha|gororfadhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gororfadhnkyaasha|gororfadhnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
